headerDisplay: Log in with your Ring account to discover and manage your Kidde smoke detectors. See the [GitHub page](https://github.com/simplytoast1/Ring-Smoke-Detectors) for more info.

name.title: Name
name.description: Exposes Kidde/Ring smart smoke and CO detectors to HomeKit via Homebridge

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Generated automatically when you log in via the settings UI

locationIds.title: Location IDs
locationIds.description: Optional: limit to specific Ring location IDs

hiddenDevices.title: Hidden Devices
hiddenDevices.description: Device IDs to exclude from HomeKit (managed via the settings UI)

deviceNames.title: Device Names
deviceNames.description: Custom display names keyed by device ID (managed via the settings UI)

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Log the plugin's debug messages at info level so they appear without running Homebridge in debug mode
